title: Multipack - PestShield Move It Cat & Dog Garden Granules Repellent - Non-Toxic, 100% Natural - 240g (2, Cat & Dog Repellent)
features: Natural Pet Repellent: Safely deters cats and dogs from garden areas using natural ingredients.
Non-Toxic Formula: Made from 100% natural ingredients, safe for pets, plants, and the environment.
Protect Your Garden: Keep your garden pristine and pet-free without harming your plants.
Easy Application: Simply scatter the granules in areas you want to protect, such as flower beds or vegetable patches.
Long-Lasting Effect: Provides lasting protection to keep cats and dogs away from treated areas.
description: Keep your garden free from unwanted pet visits with PestShield Move It Cat & Dog Garden Repellent. Our natural pet repellent is specially formulated to deter cats and dogs from garden areas, ensuring your plants remain undisturbed and your outdoor space stays pristine. Crafted from 100% natural ingredients, our formula is non-toxic and safe for use around pets, plants, and the environment. You can rest assured that your furry friends and your garden are in good hands with our gentle yet effective repellent. Protecting your garden is easy with PestShield Move It. Simply scatter the granules in areas you want to keep pet-free, such as flower beds, vegetable patches, or around ornamental plants. Our repellent works by emitting a scent that cats and dogs find unpleasant, discouraging them from entering treated areas. Unlike harsh chemical repellents, our natural formula won't harm your plants or the environment. Plus, it provides long-lasting protection, keeping cats and dogs away from treated areas for extended periods. Whether you're tired of pets digging up your flower beds or leaving unwanted surprises on your lawn, PestShield Move It Cat & Dog Garden Repellent is the solution you've been looking for. Keep your garden beautiful and pet-free with our natural, non-toxic repellent.
